cross_disciplinary_pairing.description: Hybrid offline agriculture assistant: ONNX CNN classifies coffee leaf images (healthy, Leaf rust, Phoma); structured farmer advisories from locale JSON; GGUF LLM powers natural offline farmer chat — same 8 GB laptop, no cloud APIs.

test_prompts.prompt: A farmer uploaded a coffee leaf photo in our offline CoffeeVision app. The ONNX classifier returned: class=Leaf rust, confidence=91%. List immediate countermeasures the farmer should take today to limit spread across the farm.

Mkulima amepakia picha ya jani kupitia CoffeeVision (nje ya mtandao). Mfumo ukagua Phoma, uhakika 88%. Andika ushauri wa haraka kwa Kiswahili: dalili, hatua za kuzuia, na lini kutumia dawa ya kuua kuvu.
